title: Request: add an option to copy automation rules and another to reorder them

posts.author: rhoran (Robert Horan)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are two requests in here
The first is to have the ability to copy an automation rule so that if I am making 5 similar rules on a board I don’t need to create it from scratch every time.
The second is the ability to reorder automation rules on a board so that they are logically grouped, instead of appearing in the order in which they are created.

posts.author: gcrawford88 (Jerry Crawford)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please…why is this not a thing!!!
